model.name: Generic Zener
model.data: DIODE {r} {1} {2} is=1e-11 n=1.5 rser={rser} bv={bv} ibv={ibv} nbv={nbv}

model.data: DIODE {r} {1} {2} is=1e-11 n=1.5 rser={rser} bv={bv} ibv={ibv} nbv={nbv}
